chapter_title: Removal of Parked and Abandoned Vehicles
text: Notwithstanding Section 22710 or any other provision of law, the department may, at the request of a local authority, other than a service authority, administer on behalf of the authority its abandoned vehicle abatement and removal program established pursuant to Section 22660.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 10. Removal of Parked and Abandoned Vehicles [22650 - 22856]
#### Article 1. Authority to Remove Vehicles [22650 - 22711]
##### § 22665

Notwithstanding Section 22710 or any other provision of law, the department may, at the request of a local authority, other than a service authority, administer on behalf of the authority its abandoned vehicle abatement and removal program established pursuant to Section 22660.

*(Amended by Stats. 1990, Ch. 1684, Sec. 4.)*

subsections.text: Notwithstanding Section 22710 or any other provision of law, the department may, at the request of a local authority, other than a service authority, administer on behalf of the authority its abandoned vehicle abatement and removal program established pursuant to Section 22660.
